title: carex spartea
intro: Carex spartea, also known as Quillgrass or Quill Sedge, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the sedge family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis. Carex spartea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in folk medicine.
